decisions.decision: Force all photo uploads to JPEG (fileType: image/jpeg, ext: jpg)
decisions.rationale: HEIC from iPhones not universally compatible on Android/Windows browsers

decisions.decision: Back from step 1 and after Log It both navigate to /tuning/build-sheet
decisions.rationale: User expectation: adding a mod lands you back on the build sheet to see it, not the tuning hub

decisions.decision: Labor Cost only shows when installedBy === 'shop', not when null or 'self'
decisions.rationale: Showing it before any selection creates noise; irrelevant until Shop is chosen

decisions.decision: Section photos on build sheet are tappable inline modal picker, not a separate route
decisions.rationale: Keeps context, matches the app's overlay style, simpler to implement

decisions.decision: TuningModDetailPage shows per-photo Set button based on mod category → group mapping
decisions.rationale: Multiple photos on one mod → user picks which one to feature; group derived from category

decisions.decision: hotfixes.sql tracks manual DB fixes outside migration sequence
decisions.rationale: Keeps a record of ad-hoc SQL applied to live DB that isn't in the numbered migration sequence

next_action: Resume testing. User is going through each category and part type on the live site (gdimension.app). Collect bug reports and fix them. Key flows to verify: (1) Add mod end-to-end, (2) Section photo set from mod detail, (3) Section photo picker from build sheet placeholder.
context_notes: All code pushed to GitHub, Vercel should auto-deploy. Supabase migration 029 and hotfixes.sql were run manually by the user. The TuningModDetailPage was previously a stub (one line). Chrome Remote Desktop setup was attempted for remote access but failed — user fell back to claude.ai/code for the mid-session work. Build sheet already had the Car type with build_sheet_*_photo fields but the columns didn't exist in DB and the cars query didn't select them — both now fixed.
